recap: Added git-branch-list-raw.bats with 7 regression tests locking down the 7-field ▮-delimited output format.

Replaced %(upstream:track) with in-function sed parsing to emit separate numeric ahead/behind fields; updated complete-git-branches-local and git-branch-list indices; added complete-git-branches-local.bats.
Updated git-branch-list to load worktree data into 4 associative arrays and render worktree-aware columns 3–5; moved branch/remote parsing into git-branch-list-raw; added scaffold tests.
Added --worktree flag to git-branch-colorize: renders branch name with ORANGE_1 fg / ORANGE_7 bg and appends powerline separator; sep stored in local variable; scaffold tests pass.
